title: Terra Mortis Downtime Submission (v1)
description: A single downtime submission. Converted from the Google Forms CSV export (YUSUF.csv). Repeating column groups (Projects 1-4, Sphere Actions 1-5, etc.) are collapsed into typed arrays. Duplicate gate questions (cols 71/72, 79/80, 86/87, 90/91) are merged to a single boolean.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime of form submission. Col 1.

player_name.description: Real name of the submitting player. Col 3.

attended_last_game.description: Whether the player attended the previous game session. Col 5.

travel_description.description: How the character travelled to/from Court and precautions taken. Col 6.

game_recount.description: Player's summary of what their character did at the last game session. Col 7.

standout_rp.description: One or two players/characters who gave standout RP moments. Col 8.

ic_correspondence.description: Short in-character letter to an NPC back home (Dear X format). Col 9.

most_trusted_pc.description: The PC the character currently trusts most. Col 10.

actively_harming_pc.description: The PC the character is currently trying to harm or hamper. Col 11.

aspirations.description: Short, medium, and long-term aspirations as freetext. Col 12. Not parsed -- player formats freely.

is_regent.description: Whether the character is currently a Territory Regent. Col 13.

territory.description: Name of the territory this character is Regent of. Null if not a Regent. Col 14.

residency_grants.description: List of PC names granted Residency (Feeding Rights) this month. Col 15.

total_residency_count.description: Total PCs granted Residency including the Regent. Col 16.

regency_action.description: Freetext description of the Regent's downtime action for the territory. Col 17.

method.description: How the character fed from the city (not Herd) this month. Freetext. Col 18.

territories.description: Per-territory feeding status. Col 19-24. Key is territory name; value is the character's feeding activity there.

influence.description: Influence spending requests per territory (cols 25-29). Integer value is the amount of Influence the player wants to spend there this downtime.

projects.description: Downtime projects (cols 30-49). Up to 4 in the Google Form; collapsed from repeating column groups into an array. Omit entries where action_type is blank or NO ACTION TAKEN.

sphere_actions.description: Actions using Allies, Mortal Status, or Mystery Cult Initiate merits (cols 50-70). Up to 5 in the Google Form; collapsed into an array. The gate question (col 50) is implicit -- array being non-empty means yes.

contact_actions.description: Information requests via Contacts merit (cols 71-78). Up to 6 freetext requests. The duplicate gate questions (cols 71, 72) are merged to a single boolean.

has_contacts.description: Whether the player indicated they have Contacts to use.

requests.description: Individual contact information requests. Each entry is the freetext from one Contact Action field.

retainer_actions.description: Actions assigned to Retainers (cols 79-85). Up to 5. Duplicate gate questions (cols 79, 80) merged to one boolean.

has_retainers.description: Whether the player indicated they have Retainers to use.

acquisitions.description: Attempts to acquire items using Resources or Skills (cols 86-89). Duplicate gate questions (cols 86, 87) merged to one boolean.

has_acquisitions.description: Whether the player indicated they want to acquire anything.

resource_acquisitions.description: Freetext: what the character is trying to acquire using their Resources merit. Col 88.

skill_acquisitions.description: Freetext: what the character is trying to acquire using Skills. Col 89.

ritual_casting.description: Theban Sorcery or Cruac casting during downtime (cols 90-92). Duplicate gate questions (cols 90, 91) merged to one boolean.

has_rituals.description: Whether the player indicated they have rituals to cast.

casting.description: Freetext: what ritual(s) the character is casting and any context. Col 92.

meta.description: ST notes, XP spend, lore questions, and form feedback (cols 93-97).

st_notes.description: Anything the player wants the STs to know about other character activities not covered above. Col 93.

xp_spend.description: Freetext XP spend declaration (what was spent, on what, total). Col 94.

lore_questions.description: Game rules, elements, or lore the player wants more information about. Col 95.

form_rating.description: Player rating of the downtime form for clarity and ease of use (1-10). Col 96.

form_comments.description: Player comments or recommendations on the downtime form or process. Col 97.

FeedingStatus.description: A character's feeding activity in a given territory for this downtime period.

Project.description: A single downtime project action. Derived from one repeating column group (Project N: cols 30-34, 35-39, 40-44, 45-49).

action_type.description: Selected action type from the dropdown. Known values from current form: 'XP Spend: Grow your character', 'Hide/Protect: Attempt to secure actions, merits, holdings, or projects', 'Feed: Dedicate extra time to feeding', 'Support: Assists any other action type by you or another', 'Investigate: Gather information or research a topic', 'Build/Establish: Create or develop something lasting'.
examples: Hide/Protect: Attempt to secure actions, merits, holdings, or projects
Feed: Dedicate extra time to feeding
Support: Assists any other action type by you or another

primary_pool.description: Primary dice pool expression and any relevant powers. Freetext as entered by the player, e.g. 'Presence 4 + Empathy 3 + Obfuscate 5 = 12'.

secondary_pool.description: Secondary dice pool for opposed or extended rolls. Freetext. May be blank.

desired_outcome.description: Brief statement of what the character is trying to achieve.

description.description: Full narrative description of the project: who is involved, what they do, any merits or XP referenced.

SphereAction.description: A single action using an Allies, Mortal Status, or Mystery Cult Initiate merit. Derived from one repeating column group (Sphere Action N: cols 51-54, 55-58, 59-62, 63-66, 67-70).

merit_type.description: The specific merit being activated, including rating where relevant, e.g. 'Allies 3 (Finance)', 'Mystery Cult Initiate 5', 'Allies 2 (Underworld)'.

action_type.description: Action type from the dropdown. Known values: 'Ambience Change (Increase): Make a Territory delicious', 'Ambience Change (Decrease): Make a Territory hostile', 'Patrol/Scout: Attempt to monitor a given Territory or area', 'Acquisition: Use your standing in Status/Mystery Cult to procure an item', 'Diplomatic: Engage in social or political manoeuvring', 'Information: Gather intelligence through your sphere'.
examples: Ambience Change (Increase): Make a Territory delicious
Patrol/Scout: Attempt to monitor a given Territory or area
Acquisition: Use your standing in Status/Mystery Cult to procure an item

desired_outcome.description: Brief statement of what this sphere action is trying to achieve.

description.description: Full narrative description of how the merit is being used and the intended effect.
